entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: A person responsible for decision-making in the system.

entities.name: knowledge system
entities.context: A conceptual framework that manages information processing.

entities.name: information
entities.context: Data that is processed and approved within the system.

entities.name: initial configuration
entities.context: The setup stage of the system before user interaction changes.

entities.name: heavy lifting
entities.context: The intensive processing work done by the system.

entities.name: key decisions
entities.context: Important choices made by V during interaction with the system.

relationships.context: V utilizes the knowledge system for decision-making.
The system processes information during operation.
Initial configuration is related to the setup of the knowledge system.
Heavy lifting refers to the processing tasks performed by the knowledge system.
V makes key decisions based on the information processed by the system.
